messages.content: Build a customer segmentation model using RFM analysis on our transaction data. Cluster customers into at least 5 segments, profile each by demographics and purchase behavior, and recommend targeted marketing strategies per segment.

Investigate the root cause of our 340% spike in return requests for the ZavaFlex Running Collection this month. Cross-reference with quality reports, customer complaints by SKU, and shipping damage claims to identify systemic issues.

Model the cash flow implications of extending payment terms from Net 30 to Net 60 for our top 10 wholesale partners. Factor in working capital cost at 8% APR and project the quarterly impact on our revolving credit facility utilization.

Create a cohort retention analysis for customers acquired through paid social vs organic search over the last 12 months. Calculate monthly retention curves, LTV projections, and break-even point for each acquisition channel.

Analyze the results of our A/B test on the product recommendation algorithm. Test group saw 3.2% CTR vs 2.8% control. Calculate statistical significance, estimate revenue impact at scale, and determine if we should ship to 100%.

Build a 3-year discounted cash flow projection for Zava's direct-to-consumer channel assuming 15% YoY growth, 42% gross margins, and increasing CAC. Calculate terminal value using both perpetuity growth and exit multiple methods.

Our platform handles 10K orders/minute during peak events. Design a capacity planning framework that: predicts when we'll hit limits, automates scaling decisions, manages cost during non-peak periods, and stress-tests before major sales events.

Analyze our Q4 hedging strategy for EUR/USD exposure on European wholesale revenue. Compare the cost of forward contracts vs options at current volatility levels and recommend optimal hedge ratios for our $45M exposure.

Design an escalation workflow for high-value customers (LTV > $5000) who file repeat complaints. Define SLA tiers, auto-routing rules, compensation authority levels, and management notification triggers.

Classify the following customer message and suggest routing: 'I bought the deck stain last week and it's already peeling. This is my third time dealing with your garbage products. I want my money back and I'm filing a BBB complaint.'

Create a sustainability assessment framework for Zava's product catalog. Score each product line on: material sourcing, manufacturing practices, packaging waste, transportation carbon, product lifespan, and end-of-life recyclability. Prioritize improvement actions by impact and feasibility.

Evaluate the legal and operational implications of converting 200 contract warehouse workers to full-time employees versus maintaining contractor status. Include: cost modeling, benefits obligations, labor law compliance (ACA, state laws), productivity impact, and turnover effects.

Calculate the weighted average cost of capital for Zava given our current debt-to-equity ratio of 0.4, cost of debt at 6.2%, and equity risk premium of 5.8%. How does this change if we issue $50M in convertible notes?
How many products in our catalog are marked as 'out of stock' right now?

Prepare a variance analysis of our FY24 operating budget vs actuals across all cost centers. Identify the top 5 unfavorable variances exceeding $500K and decompose each into volume, rate, and mix components.

Design a SQL-based anomaly detection pipeline for our daily revenue data. Flag days where revenue deviates more than 2.5 standard deviations from the 30-day rolling average, segmented by region and product category.

Build a market basket analysis on our order data. Identify the top 20 product affinity pairs, calculate lift and confidence metrics, and recommend cross-sell opportunities with expected revenue impact for the product team.

Compare Snowflake vs Databricks for our analytics workload migration. Consider: cost at our data volume (5TB growing 30% annually), SQL analyst usability, ML workload support, and governance features.

Analyze our first-contact resolution rate drop from 78% to 61% over the past quarter. Segment by channel (chat, email, phone), agent tenure, and issue category to identify which cohorts are driving the decline.

Analyze our website funnel conversion data from landing page to purchase completion. Calculate stage-by-stage drop-off rates, segment by device type and traffic source, and identify the highest-leverage optimization opportunities.
What percentage of our products have fewer than 5 customer reviews?

Draft a communication to all-hands explaining the restructuring of the marketing department — 2 teams are merging, one director role is being eliminated, and 4 individual contributors are being redeployed.

Model the IRR and payback period for opening 3 new flagship retail stores in London, Tokyo, and Dubai. Include buildout CapEx of $3M per store, ramp-to-profitability timeline, and sensitivity analysis on foot traffic assumptions.
Summarize the competitive actions our top 3 competitors took last month.

Analyze the impact of implementing dynamic pricing on our gross margin. Compare scenarios: current flat pricing vs 10% markup on high-demand SKUs vs time-decay promotional pricing. Project annual revenue and margin impact.

Create a demand forecasting model for our top 50 SKUs using time series decomposition. Separate trend, seasonality, and residual components. Evaluate ARIMA vs exponential smoothing accuracy using MAPE on holdout data.

Run a price elasticity analysis across our product categories. Use historical transaction data to estimate demand curves, identify optimal price points that maximize contribution margin, and flag categories where we're leaving money on the table.

Our CSAT score for the returns process fell below 3.0. Map the entire returns journey from RMA request to refund confirmation, identify each friction point with drop-off data, and propose process improvements with expected CSAT impact.
Compare carrier performance (UPS, FedEx, regional carriers) across on-time delivery, damage rates, and cost per package for the last quarter.

Build a customer lifetime value prediction model using our first-purchase features (channel, category, discount usage, AOV). Compare logistic regression vs gradient boosting approaches and validate on a 6-month holdout period.
How many customers escalated to a supervisor last month?

Draft a creative brief for a summer campaign promoting Zava's new outdoor furniture line. Target audience: homeowners aged 30-50, budget: $500K, duration: 6 weeks, channels: social + programmatic display.
Model the cash flow implications of extending payment terms from Net 30 to Net 60 for our top 5 wholesale accounts. They're requesting this for continued partnership.

Analyze our email marketing performance across 200+ campaigns from the last year. Build a multivariate model predicting open rates and conversion from subject line features, send time, segment, and content type.

Build a predictive model for ticket volume forecasting. Use our last 18 months of ticket data segmented by category, day-of-week, seasonality, and product launch events to help workforce planning optimize agent scheduling.

Build a comprehensive Q1 2025 business review for Zava's executive team. Include: (1) revenue performance vs plan by region and category, (2) key growth drivers and headwinds, (3) customer acquisition cost trends, (4) margin analysis, and (5) three actionable recommendations for Q2 prioritization.
Create a re-engagement campaign strategy for 50K lapsed customers who haven't purchased in 6+ months. Segment them by last product category and propose tailored win-back offers.
Build a set of macros/templates for the three most common support scenarios we handle. Each should have personalization variables and escalation triggers.

We received 847 complaints about late delivery in the Northeast region this week. Investigate the fulfillment pipeline — check carrier SLA compliance, warehouse processing times, and last-mile delivery exceptions to identify the bottleneck.
What's the attach rate for accessories when customers buy yoga mats? Has it changed since we added the 'Complete Your Setup' recommendation widget?

Create a comprehensive quality scorecard for our outsourced support team in Manila. Define KPIs (AHT, CSAT, FCR, escalation rate, QA score), set thresholds for each, and design the monthly review cadence with penalty/incentive structure.

Evaluate build-vs-buy for a customer data platform (CDP). Compare building on our existing data warehouse with Segment, mParticle, or a custom event streaming solution. Consider: data volume, real-time requirements, team capabilities, total cost over 3 years, and vendor lock-in risk.
How many open Jira tickets are assigned to the platform engineering team?
Analyze the trend in average basket size over the past 6 months. Is bundling (buying apparel + home improvement together) increasing? What's driving the change?
Analyze the correlation between our loyalty program tier and purchase frequency. Are Platinum members actually buying more than Gold?
Our data pipeline for inventory updates is running 2 hours behind. Trace the bottleneck — is it the source system, transformation layer, or the loading step? What monitoring should we add?

Design a dashboard tracking our key product metrics: daily active users by platform, feature adoption rates, session duration distributions, and error rates. Define the SQL queries needed and alerting thresholds for each KPI.

Perform a geographic expansion analysis. Cluster potential markets by demographic similarity to our best-performing zip codes, overlay with competitor density and logistics feasibility, and rank the top 10 expansion targets.

Create a security audit checklist for the new vendor integration with our payment processor. Cover data encryption, access controls, API authentication, PCI compliance requirements, and penetration testing needs.
Draft a policy update for our hybrid work arrangement. The proposal is 3 days in-office for HQ staff, with flexibility for teams to choose their days. Address common objections.
List the most common complaint about our yoga pants line.
Our internal Slack bot for deployment approvals is unreliable. Diagnose why it's dropping messages and propose a more robust implementation.

Create a voice-of-customer report synthesizing themes from support tickets, product reviews, NPS verbatims, and social media mentions from Q1. Identify the top 5 systemic issues and recommended owners.
What's the average product rating for our yoga pants line?
Analyze our price elasticity for premium running jackets ($150+ range). Did the 10% price increase in March affect volume?
How many open positions does Zava currently have posted?
What's the current error rate on the checkout service?
Analyze our cloud cost allocation by team. Which services are the biggest cost drivers, and where do we have idle or over-provisioned resources we could rightsize?
Identify patterns in negative product reviews for our premium home tool set. Are there consistent quality issues we should escalate to the product team?

Design a comprehensive observability strategy for Zava's microservices architecture. Cover: distributed tracing implementation, metrics collection and alerting thresholds, log aggregation, SLO definitions for each service tier, runbook automation, and on-call rotation optimization. Budget the tooling costs.
Summarize the key findings from the customer research study conducted in March. What are the top 3 unmet needs, and how do they map to our current roadmap?

Create a board-ready presentation outline on Zava's AI strategy. Cover: current AI usage (personalization, demand forecasting, support automation), competitive landscape, investment needed, expected ROI, ethical guardrails, and 3-year capability roadmap.
How many employees are using the new expense reporting tool?
How many vendor invoices are past due by more than 30 days?
Compare inventory turnover rates across our home improvement category for the past 3 quarters. Which subcategories have dead stock building up?
Prepare a 2-page executive briefing on Zava's competitive position in the home improvement e-commerce space. Include market share trends, competitor moves, and our relative strengths/weaknesses.
What's our monthly AWS spend trend for the last 6 months?

Construct a scenario analysis for Zava's debt refinancing: compare extending our $100M term loan at SOFR+250bps vs issuing investment-grade bonds vs a private placement. Factor in covenants, prepayment penalties, and issuance costs.
Analyze the accuracy of our demand forecast for the spring running collection. Where did we over-order vs under-order, and what was the financial impact of each?
Which store location had the highest foot traffic yesterday?
How many internal transfers were approved last quarter?

Our CMO is presenting to the board on marketing's contribution to revenue. Build a marketing attribution and ROI framework that: accounts for multi-touch journeys, separates brand and performance marketing, handles online-to-offline attribution, and provides clear executive-level dashboards.

Analyze the correlation between our product defect rates and negative customer reviews. For each product category, calculate the defect-to-review ratio and identify which defect types generate the most social media escalations.
Our email unsubscribe rate jumped to 2.1% this month (from 0.8% baseline). Analyze what changed — was it send frequency, content relevance, a specific segment, or list hygiene issues?

Design a circular supply chain strategy for Zava's athletic apparel line. Include take-back logistics, refurbishment processes, resale channel design, sustainability metrics, and projected financial impact. Benchmark against Patagonia and Nike's programs.

Our CFO needs a bridge analysis from Q3 to Q4 EBITDA. Decompose the $8M delta into organic growth, pricing actions, new channel contribution, FX headwinds, and one-time restructuring charges with waterfall chart data.

Evaluate the financial viability of acquiring our primary leather supplier. Model synergies from vertical integration (margin improvement, supply security), compute accretion/dilution at various purchase multiples, and recommend max bid price.
What's our effective tax rate for fiscal year 2024?
We're seeing a 40% increase in 'where is my order' tickets from the Pacific Northwest. Investigate whether this correlates with carrier delays or a fulfillment center issue.
Identify the top 10 SKUs by revenue contribution in home improvement and flag any that have declining month-over-month trajectory.
What's our customer lifetime value segmented by acquisition channel? Compare paid search, organic, social, and email for customers acquired in 2024.

Our chatbot deflection rate dropped from 45% to 28% after the last product catalog update. Diagnose which intents are failing, review the conversation logs for misclassified queries, and recommend retraining priorities.

A customer is claiming they received a damaged power drill (order #ZV-20250312-8847) and wants a replacement, but our system shows the item was delivered intact. Draft a response that acknowledges their concern and outlines next steps.
Summarize the strategic implications of the proposed acquisition of a 20-store regional hardware chain. What synergies exist with Zava's home improvement business?
Analyze which product categories generate the most post-purchase support load within 7 days of delivery. Are there onboarding or documentation improvements that could reduce tickets?
What's our average shipping time from order to delivery this month?
Analyze the financial impact of our promotional pricing strategy this quarter. How much margin did we sacrifice, and did the volume lift compensate?
Prepare a scenario analysis for Q2 revenue: best case, base case, and worst case. Define assumptions for each and the resulting impact on EBITDA.
What's our current headcount by department?
Compare customer satisfaction scores for orders fulfilled from our own warehouse versus third-party logistics partners. Is there a meaningful quality gap?

Calculate our inventory carrying cost as a percentage of revenue. Break down into warehousing, insurance, shrinkage, and opportunity cost components. How much working capital would we free up by reducing average days-on-hand from 85 to 60?

Perform a cohort analysis of customer churn triggered by support interactions. Track customers who filed complaints in Q1 — what percentage churned within 90 days vs control group? Segment by resolution outcome and response time.

Run a Monte Carlo simulation on our FY25 revenue forecast. Model demand uncertainty across our 4 channels (DTC, wholesale, marketplace, retail) with correlated variables and provide P10/P50/P90 confidence intervals.

Map our warranty claim lifecycle end-to-end. Current average resolution is 23 days — identify processing bottlenecks, calculate cost per claim by product tier, and model the financial impact of reducing resolution time to 10 days.

Evaluate our multi-channel support routing strategy. Compare agent utilization, resolution rates, and cost-per-contact across chat, email, phone, and social. Identify misrouted tickets and quantify the cost of suboptimal routing.
What's the average time from product concept to launch for athletic footwear?
What's the budget variance for the IT department in Q1?
Evaluate our SEO competitive position for 'best running shoes 2025'. Who's outranking us, what content type dominates the SERP, and what would it take to reach position 1?
Show me the status of the data warehouse migration project.
What is our current average order value for athletic apparel?
